title: agrostis drummondiana
intro: Agrostis drummondiana, also known as Drummond's bent or Drummond's grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis drummondiana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Agrostis drummondiana typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas or tonics to harness its medicinal benefits.
